key_features: Mock factories for repository and event service
Coverage of CRUD operations with tenant isolation
test_coverage_areas: List operations with pagination and filtering
Create operations with validation and auto-generation

patterns_discovered.description: Structured factory functions for creating mocks (createMockRepository, createMockEventService, createMockBranch)
patterns_discovered.benefits: Reduces duplication, consistent mock setup, easy to extend with overrides

patterns_discovered.description: Each test follows clear AAA pattern with comments
patterns_discovered.benefits: Improved readability and consistency across test suite

patterns_discovered.description: Tests validate both success paths and error conditions with AppException
patterns_discovered.benefits: Ensures robust error handling and validation logic

patterns_discovered.description: Tests explicitly verify organizationId is passed to repository methods
Separate mock factories for objects with and without relations

gotchas_discovered.description: Tests verify MAX_HIERARCHY_DEPTH constraint is enforced when creating child branches
gotchas_discovered.impact: Important for preventing deeply nested branch structures
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Tests confirm getHierarchyDepth validation prevents exceeding depth limit

gotchas_discovered.description: When creating first branch in organization, isMain flag must be automatically set to true
gotchas_discovered.impact: Critical for ensuring every organization has a main branch
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Specific test case validates this behavior based on count

gotchas_discovered.description: Branch codes must be unique within organization scope, with auto-generation fallback
gotchas_discovered.impact: Prevents code collisions and ensures unique identifiers
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Tests verify codeExists checks and auto-generation with suffix increments

gotchas_discovered.description: Child branch creation requires validating parent exists in same organization
gotchas_discovered.impact: Prevents orphaned branches and maintains valid hierarchy
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Tests verify findByIdOrThrow is called with correct tenant context

gotchas_discovered.description: Create operations trigger domain events that must be emitted after successful creation
gotchas_discovered.impact: Ensures downstream systems are notified of branch lifecycle events
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Tests verify emitCustom is called with correct event data

approach_outcome.description: Create tests for Organization, User, Branch modules
approach_outcome.implementation_strategy: Created comprehensive unit test suite using Vitest with mock factories pattern, covering CRUD operations, validation, error handling, and business logic constraints
key_achievements: Implemented 755 lines of branch service tests with complete mock setup
Created reusable mock factory functions for consistent test data
Covered all major service methods: list, getById, create, update, delete, hierarchy
Validated tenant isolation in all operations
Tested error scenarios and edge cases
Verified event emission on state changes
Enforced business constraints (hierarchy depth, code uniqueness, main branch assignment)
approach_outcome.commit_message: auto-claude: subtask-8-4 - Create tests for Organization, User, Branch modules

recommendations.recommendation: Monitor integration test coverage for Organization and User modules to ensure similar comprehensive test suites
recommendations.rationale: Branch module tests are complete; similar depth needed for other core modules

recommendations.recommendation: Consider extracting mock factories to shared test utilities file as codebase grows
recommendations.rationale: Will reduce duplication when similar patterns appear in other module tests

recommendations.recommendation: Document expected AppException error codes in test comments for better maintainability
recommendations.rationale: Helps future developers understand business error conditions quickly

recommendations.recommendation: Consider adding tests for concurrent operations and race conditions if branch operations support concurrent access
recommendations.rationale: Current tests cover sequential scenarios well; concurrency testing would add robustness

recommendations.recommendation: Add performance benchmarks for hierarchy queries as depth limit tests suggest complex lookups
recommendations.rationale: getHierarchyDepth and findChildren operations may benefit from performance validation
